tweets.text: Here are 13 stories that shaped our world this year: http://t.co/sTbiO4xQPC. What do you think were the most significant events in 2013?
U.S. extends condolences on the death of Mike O'Connor, #Mexico Rep. of @pressfreedom. http://t.co/1ydCHtjr41
New, simple agricultural technologies are at heart of innovation, will be game-changers in #Cambodia. Learn how at http://t.co/NYTTZKsaou.
We stand with the #Russian people against terrorism and condemn in strongest terms the attack in #Volgograd http://t.co/UkKE83qQeT
#SecKerry to travel to #Jerusalem and #Ramallah Jan.1 to discuss final status negotiations w Netanyahu and Abbas http://t.co/D57Iq3DWtC
#SecKerry: The abhorrent terrorist assassination of Mohamad Chatah in Beirut is a terrible loss for #Lebanon http://t.co/q5gVhYWbPx
Between us we've sold 30 million-JK @SnoopDogg: "Boss life. me n john kerry at d white house !!! #reincarnated #khc http://t.co/cJgfBQgevx”
We welcome the political/diplomatic initiatives between #Iraq's PM Maliki and #KRG PM Barzani today http://t.co/lEYO0DUtfX
We extend our condolences to the families and condemn in strongest terms the terrorist bombing in Mansoura #Egypt http://t.co/c3Mj4VPepi
We call for an immediate end to the violence in #SouthSudan and the beginning of mediated political talks. http://t.co/bwuklYgXBP
We are deeply concerned about #Uganda’s new anti-homosexuality law and appeal to respect #LGBT and all #humanrights http://t.co/5aQuHW1PJi
A fire warms #SecKerry's outer office. We wish you a happy holiday season filled with family, friends & peace. http://t.co/ccVfZZSJJB
U.S. urges govt of #GuineaBissau to adhere to election calendar, including voter registration & election security: http://t.co/6BGdRDk3K1
U.S. deeply concerned about jail sentences for peaceful demonstrators, worsening climate for free assembly in #Egypt: http://t.co/PVndhhvcmA
#SecKerry & his puppy Ben film a holiday video to @StateDept employees in Treaty Room. More: http://t.co/rhjBqxBVJB http://t.co/fJwEJ0cWys
What does an election observer do? Get a firsthand account from #Mozambique's elections: http://t.co/yxe0gszoPe http://t.co/Kgdyv2nZjc
US strongly condemns bus bombing near Tel Aviv today. Our thoughts are with those affected & #Israel's people. http://t.co/REXISG66ww
U.S. condemns attacks and pledges to support #Iraq in the fight against ISIL. http://t.co/zcdcssoqRh
We have evacuated approximately 380 US officials, private citizens from #SouthSudan. Update on US citizen evacuation: http://t.co/TtJNj936CZ
Nelson Mandela has made his final return to his hometown, Qunu. Learn about the tribute given by this small town at http://t.co/Iw5XaC0bBY.
#SecKerry: US welcomes Mikhail Khodorkovskiy's pardon & prison release, encourages #Russia to pursue judicial reform. http://t.co/aj1bQWLStd
#SecKerry: US committed to realization of #SouthSudan’s potential. Violence will not pave way for a stable tomorrow. http://t.co/KoF1VDD2b2
US is actively working to help end violence, provide humanitarian assistance in #CAR. Fact sheet: http://t.co/CjCmlboTrr
Toys donated by @StateDept employees fill boxes in our lobby, destined for the @USMC's Toys for Tots program. http://t.co/V2In5IQkTV
US remains deeply concerned about horrific violence committed by armed groups against innocent civilians in #CAR. http://t.co/XTbThEC466
US welcomes official transition to African Union-led International Support Mission in #CentralAfricanRepublic. http://t.co/XTbThEC466 #CAR
Learn how @afriCoderDojo helps African youth develop coding skills to compete in tomorrow's marketpace. http://t.co/R2swuCLDoN
On the 3rd anniversary of the events of December 19, 2010, we stand with the people of #Belarus. http://t.co/GreJDowlPs
#TTIP aims to lower tariffs, reducing costs for consumers on both sides of the Atlantic. Learn more about TTIP at http://t.co/gahtlMMDno.
Have you visited here? @USUNRome & @ICCROM are conserving cultural heritage here & worldwide. http://t.co/mG9SFd1vtF http://t.co/h2rLncO7W0
Today, #SecKerry announced $25 million in new #TyphoonHaiyan aid in Tacloban, #Philippines. http://t.co/JTt9LhnbEU http://t.co/IBWSkDPsEU
.@USEmbassyBurma harnesses the universal appeal of soccer to bring local children together. http://t.co/SJxVn3en2x http://t.co/f0mLOjOmt0
#SecKerry met with staff from @usembassymanila earlier today. His remarks: http://t.co/oy1RjAUygf http://t.co/ZLva4gsmkw
Over 17,000 Americans & Filipinos are buried at Clark Veterans Cemetery in the Philippines. http://t.co/mHxVNdTUJK. http://t.co/5E6eAWaQb9
The US congratulates Dr. Michelle Bachelet on her election as the next President of #Chile. More: http://t.co/RozHEynL1x
#SecKerry: Our relationship with #Vietnam is deepening. | Remarks with FM Pham Binh Minh: http://t.co/cltUNBdCWb http://t.co/1pWqecRRbQ
US & #Vietnam are working together to tackle the most difficult environmental challenges of our day. More info: http://t.co/jAMwatqJPH
Read #SecKerry's remarks to students in #Vietnam about #climatechange & the environment: http://t.co/sJB8fT5cnB. http://t.co/KZi4IGwwl0
Today, #SecKerry announced $32.5 million in assistance toward maritime capacity building in Southeast Asia. http://t.co/gBRDXXjrwy
#SecKerry announced U.S.-Vietnam Comprehensive Partnership deliverables during his visit to #Vietnam this weekend: http://t.co/38vNdI6tEz
#SecKerry: US remains concerned over the fate of Sombath Somphone on the 1-year anniversary of his abduction. http://t.co/pGYp1o4aK3 #Laos
Did you miss #SecKerry’s video message to troops during the #ArmyNavy Game? Watch it here: http://t.co/pTjkrLqAQy.
Missing @USArmy-@USNavy game while traveling!  DVR is set - don't tell me the score. #GoNavyBeatArmy -JK
Congratulations to Hungary, new member of Global Partnership Against Spread of Weapons, Materials of Mass Destruction http://t.co/wBTC42uejS
.@MichelleWKwan explains how "going for gold" on #disabilityrights will make us all stronger: http://t.co/N8r5c9NAMD.
Xin Chao, on way to #Vietnam for 1st time as Sec. See video sent in advance - sorry if my Vietnamese is rusty! http://t.co/6bD8kNwPvK -JK
#SecKerry's remarks to reporters in Tel Aviv today: http://t.co/4ObzGnsVom. | More photos: http://t.co/SdWo2g8cLh http://t.co/Qo7JcXm3Hn
.@StateDept's Global Peace Operations Initiative has trained 225,000+ peacekeeping personnel, including in #Malaysia. http://t.co/YgzpEKU2dk
#SecKerry with PM @Netanyahu: I’m delighted to be here, look forward to having some good talks http://t.co/sWQ34eqeHQ http://t.co/YBX5PxNwzj
Over last two years @PEPFAR-supported programs have allowed 470,000 babies of HIV-positive women to be born HIV-free. http://t.co/hO4iIk5bwN
US condemns in the strongest possible terms the recent massacres of Syrian civilians. More: http://t.co/EIEAaZfksR #Syria
#SecKerry: I extend my warm congratulations to Juan Orlando Hernandez on his election as President of #Honduras. http://t.co/bwl8ac7aXF
Did you miss #SecKerry's remarks at @ForeignPolicy's Transformational Trends Strategic Forum? Watch his speech here: http://t.co/p2AxqeGdtP
US commits financing toward CASA-1000, which helps create energy grid connecting Central & South Asia for 1st time. http://t.co/fjRvkaG4CO
Starting now: Under Secretary Wendy Sherman testifies before @SenateBanking on P5+1 Agreement with #Iran. Watch live: http://t.co/nZRtJGJXaG
#SecKerry: We can beat malaria. Read the Secretary's new blog entry on winning the fight to end malaria: http://t.co/F4EmjnCDKU.
Thanks for all of the kind birthday wishes! As @GeorgeHWBush said on his birthday last year, it's better than the alternative. --JK
Today in #Ukraine, Asst Secretary Nuland offered food to police and pro-EU activists in Kiev’s Independence Square. http://t.co/sAku0fikqz
Ready for that up-coming trip abroad? Tune in to tomorrow's 11am ET Google+ Hangout with @travelgov on holiday travel http://t.co/JE7XvByM6x
In honor of his 70th birthday, #SecKerry received @KilvertForbes cookies from staff today. Ben settled for a biscuit. http://t.co/GtxDZAVkQA
#SecKerry: As church bells ring amidst the smoke in the streets of Kyiv, the U.S. stands with the people of #Ukraine. They deserve better.
#SecKerry: Ukrainian authorities' response to Maidan Square protest is not acceptable, does not befit a democracy. http://t.co/9m4n1ZupMD
On #HumanRightsDay, @StateDept welcomes new private sector support for Global Equality Fund, advancing #LGBT rights. http://t.co/D3HEj7hbwy
#SecKerry: On this #HumanRightsDay, the U.S. honors those who risk their lives to secure universal rights for all. http://t.co/WmLEhkLiFA
Welcoming to Twitter a real gentleman, skilled statesman, @USNavy man, and Eli 1st baseman: @GeorgeHWBush. --JK
As societies, we have the right to choose our own destiny. President Obama proclaims December 10 #HumanRightsDay. http://t.co/H4ovWR3TD8
#SecKerry: The national security of the US is stronger than it was before we entered into this agreement. #Iran
'His Day is Done.' @DrMayaAngelou reads her tribute to Nelson Mandela on behalf of the American people: http://t.co/sLQvV4sR8g
Remarks by President Obama at the memorial service for former South African President Nelson Mandela: http://t.co/bySQ5eWgST
President Obama speaks at the memorial service for President Nelson #Mandela at 4:00 AM EST today. Watch on http://t.co/h2SJWiKBn5.
During a call with President Yanukovych, @VP Biden expressed deep concern about the situation in Ukraine. More: http://t.co/YTQBWo2oem
President Obama: You -- the proud citizens of #CAR -- have the power to choose a different path. You can chose peace. http://t.co/GNamuNCLfx
This week marks 5th anniversary of Nobel laureate Liu Xiaobo's detention. We urge Chinese authorities to release him. http://t.co/2DjHivtmZ5
U.S. strongly supports democratic institutions and the democratic process in #Thailand, a long-time friend and ally. http://t.co/EIzaH7slwB
Back at Main State after another trip - my new sidekick Ben tests the elevator. #woof –JK http://t.co/mREwLP5I7a
#SecKerry: US salutes individuals, governments, organizations dedicated to preventing, combating corruption http://t.co/bbYRwL6zwz #IACD2013
.@StatePRM's Asst. Secretary Richard: Proud to be at 2013 #RefugeeCongress - #refugees are making their voices heard! http://t.co/hn2ddvwvuO
#SecKerry remembers Nelson Mandela as an inspiration and a model on #DipNote. http://t.co/zdKdba4QcF
Live now at http://t.co/9GkjAMxDYm: President Obama speaks at the Saban Forum. #Saban13
Live today at 4PM ET: #SecKerry delivers remarks at the Saban Forum. Watch at http://t.co/gTAxgZ3dyN! #Saban13
US commends actions by French military & regional forces to begin restoring security to #CentralAfricanRepublic. http://t.co/v2G9XZIHCW #CAR
In this @StateDept video, @DrMayaAngelou presents a poem in tribute of the late Nelson Mandela. Watch here: http://t.co/sLQvV4sR8g
All U.S. diplomatic missions to fly American flag at half-staff in honor of President Mandela. http://t.co/5EBFbKzLTz http://t.co/fhbo2bRF8I
#SecKerry in #Israel: We take Mandela's example to heart as we face challenge of trying to reach two-state solution. http://t.co/styPGkJE16
#SecKerry: The example Mandela set for humanity lives on. He will be remembered as a pioneer for peace. Statement: http://t.co/G3whYrp0aG
Madiba’s long walk has ended, but his example lives on for all. #inspiration -JK
#SecKerry: I am very grateful to President Abbas for his commitment to these negotiations. http://t.co/QEtScTiFk1 http://t.co/v7zsK1JWWg
US condemns terrorist attack against #Yemen's Ministry of Defense, which resulted in senseless killings, woundings. http://t.co/iTLmVRj2ee
Live now! Google+ Hangout on #DisabilityRights w/@IntDisability's Judith Heumann, Michelle Kwan & #Paralympians: http://t.co/HbaICAk3aQ
.@StateDept spokesperson: We are in contact with family, providing consular assistance. Out of privacy respect, we have no further comment.
.@StateDept spokesperson: We can confirm that a US citizen was shot, killed in Benghazi, Libya. We offer condolences to victim’s loved ones.
Watch, read joint statement by #SecKerry, #Israel's PM @Netanyahu on Middle East Peace, #Iran: http://t.co/gtfiQwcZTu http://t.co/0EhQmZUX88
US is appalled by reports of the murder of innocent women & children outside of Bangui, #CentralAfricanRepublic. http://t.co/Fk6VToImDO #CAR
(Video) #SecKerry shows support for the Ukrainian people during remarks at @NATO. http://t.co/H6Mi1T7f7I
Tomorrow on Google+: Special Advisor for @IntDisability Rights Heumann & Michelle Kwan discuss disability rights. http://t.co/HbaICAk3aQ
#SecKerry: The reforms #Moldova is putting in place, your determination to align with Europe is fundamental. Remarks: http://t.co/f3noX3xbYh
#SecKerry: We urge #Ukraine's government to listen to people who want to live in freedom, opportunity, prosperity. http://t.co/Vtsizk4OSV
Last night, after @NATO Ministerial meetings, #SecKerry toured the Christmas-bedecked Grand Place in #Brussels. http://t.co/84GTMgUMRW
#SecKerry in Brussels: High Rep. Ashton's efforts on #Iran first step have been key. Remarks: http://t.co/sqhF8694Et http://t.co/AXRTFF1eo1
Special Advisor for @IntDisability Rights Heumann & Michelle Kwan discuss disability rights on Google+ 12/5 @ 1pm ET. http://t.co/HbaICAk3aQ
#SecKerry in Brussels: 2014 is going to be a pivotal time for @NATO. | Full transcript and video of his remarks: http://t.co/8xb42x7qDA
Inspiring, motivating statement in President’s #IDPD2013 Proclamation. Must finish the job on #DisabilitiesTreaty. –JK
.@ECAatState initiative shows us that #IDPD2013 is about living #WithoutLimits. http://t.co/tfSXe3oyWS http://t.co/EdVdQFLdgI
Special Advisor for @IntDisability Rights Heumann explains importance of #DisabilitiesTreaty in 60 seconds. Watch: http://t.co/9Yt7rkv5Nq
40% of #Syria's total population is in need of humanitarian assistance. What does this mean as winter arrives? http://t.co/ahu7kKNJTJ
US welcomes decision to invite #Israel to join Western European and Others Group in Geneva, beginning January 1. http://t.co/rtATSIISo0
Trip coming up and your passport has expired? @StateDept offers expedited passport services! Learn more here: http://t.co/dR4X4bc5et
U.S. calls on #Cuba's government to release Alan Gross immediately and unconditionally. http://t.co/hWYiFlilMW
#SecKerry & @StateDept veterans record message to air during @CBSSportsNet's @USArmy-@USNavy football game broadcast. http://t.co/QW0k74oOam
#SecKerry: On World #AIDS Day, we recommit ourselves to the work still ahead to achieve an #AIDSFreeGen. http://t.co/P0oZfStqLK #WAD2013
December 1 is World AIDS Day. Follow @PEPFAR and visit http://t.co/sMORqZrLMc for more information. #WAD2013
